title: Thought
description: Adds a mob that has a "wrong" interpretation of Pottery Sherd.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7120580e78415bff31a01d63f8a72679816264c0.png)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About

This mod adds new fictional mobs.
All of the mobs have "wrong" interpretations of the mobs depicted in Pottery Sherd.

# Mobs

## Snort - Wrong Sniffer
![Snort](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d7e7b5b4303fd8f8537313ccc95b463694dc135.png)

This ancient mob is considered a fearsome predator with a large nose and mouth.

Feeding them fish will make them fatter and drop more meat.

They can be bred using sniffer eggs.

## Mourner & Luminous - Wrong Warden & Firefly
![Mourner & Luminous](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b87b4161506b50e7d1ecf6b28d2e35a724d5445.png)

This tree monster is a kind-hearted being who mourns death.

If you offer an item related to souls, you will be given a Mourning Bloom.

You can earn rewards by offer Mourning Bloom to the Warden.

However, while you have Mourning Bloom, Luminous will spawn and attack you.

When you take damage, Mourning Bloom will scatter one by one.

Inspired by Hollow Knight!

## Danger - Wrong Creeper
## ![Danger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b681f082546be1c02c1c3fa714f39d1737c483.png)

This Creepy Creeper is an ancient mob that did not have explosive abilities.

They attack all monsters.

When they attack a creeper, the creeper loses its explosive power.

They can be bred using gunpowder.

## Friend - Wrong Villager
![Friend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48aeefb18caa21838f1680c4e86a31733979e7b2.png)

They are a type of cute villager that everyone likes.

If you right click, they will become your friend.

If you invite them to your home (current spawn point), they will sometimes give you gifts.

If you give some dye, the costume will change.

# Imagine
![Imagine Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66e154a6387b6e546b05043f191bb3d78d4c339.png)
Mobs in this mod can be accessed by crafting.

You can craft a Spawn Item using any Pottery Sherd, Egg, and Experience Bottle.
